classification_value_ladder.meaning: Faithful local label retained for audit; it does not organize another scientific iteration
Travels beyond one local setup or clarifies a reusable contrast
Produces a new question, missing boundary, support function, or ladder rung
Defines a bounded probe, intervention, comparison, or measurement rule
Requires revision of how the core proposition or ontology is understood

rungs.name: Auditable medium history
Later formation or susceptibility sign
Medium-history-specific functional dependence
Withdrawal and source controls preserve specificity
Meaningful carrier or timescale variation retains the relation
One auditable non-private pool
Attributable contributions from multiple sources
Later response depends on combined pool history
Mailbox, controller, shuffle, and contributor controls preserve specificity
Capacity, contributor, or access variation retains the shared-pool function
Costly attributable deposition
Persistent decaying or reinforced trace
Later routing depends functionally on trace history
Withdrawal, shuffle, and false-trace controls preserve specificity
Geometry or timescale variation retains the route relation
Auditable support field and fragile reference
Support-conditioned formation or stability sign
Specific admissibility function beyond generic allocation
Withdrawal and hidden-allocation controls preserve the bounded function
Susceptibility or support variation retains the relation
Maintained selective boundary state
Ingress, egress, or transformation sign
Exchange depends specifically on boundary condition
Neutralization, inversion, and direct-bypass controls preserve specificity
Permeability, load, maintenance, or repair variation retains the relation
Audited capacity reserve and ledger
Circulation, depletion, replenishment, or floor sign
Eligibility depends specifically on capacity history
Disable, source-shuffle, free-injection, and leakage controls preserve specificity
Topology or timescale variation retains the circulation relation
Source-current parent and local surfaces classified
Parent-local relation and state handoff operationally defined
Future discriminator separates parent conditioning from labels or scheduling
Constructed contrast and withdrawal preserve evidence-role separation
Demand class is reusable enough to organize a graph-side discriminator

threshold_relations.rule: every per-seed margin is greater than positive delta
every per-seed margin is greater than zero, at least one is greater than delta, and at least one is less than or equal to delta
every absolute per-seed margin is less than or equal to delta
per-seed margins cross or touch zero and at least one lies outside the resolution band
every per-seed margin is less than zero, at least one is less than negative delta, and at least one is greater than or equal to negative delta
every per-seed margin is less than negative delta
delta is not frozen; robust or narrow language is prohibited
the cell is artifact inspection or has no live numeric relation
